title: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14
wikitext:
[]: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14             Quote Post by Biggie_bruh » Fri Jun 27, 2025 1:12 pm Hi I’ve been trying to find an isolated version of Rei’s monologue from Episode 14. I’m working on a marching band show and would love to use that monologue as a voiceover, but every version I can find has the music score in the background, which makes it hard to isolate her voice cleanly. Does anyone know if a music free or isolated vocal track exists

[]: Re: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 27, 2025 3:36 pm As an "if all else fails", and while I've not dabbled in this area myself, a quick search for "ai sound demux" shows a number of free tools to separate the different tracks from a sound file - if it doubt, just throw computational power at the problem.

Article: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14
[]: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14             Quote Post by Biggie_bruh » Fri Jun 27, 2025 1:12 pm Hi I’ve been trying to find an isolated version of Rei’s monologue from Episode 14. I’m working on a marching band show and would love to use that monologue as a voiceover, but every version I can find has the music score in the background, which makes it hard to isolate her voice cleanly. Does anyone know if a music free or isolated vocal track exists

[]: Re: Help Finding Isolated Track Episode 14             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 27, 2025 3:36 pm As an "if all else fails", and while I've not dabbled in this area myself, a quick search for "ai sound demux" shows a number of free tools to separate the different tracks from a sound file - if it doubt, just throw computational power at the problem.
